title: BeyondTrust Retrieve Credentials
content:
Playbook for retrieving credentials for BeyondTrust Password Safe

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (BeyondTrust_Password_Safe, xsoar-supported).

Outputs — BeyondTrust.Account.AccountName: Name of the managed account.; BeyondTrust.Account.AccountID: ID of the managed account.; BeyondtrustAccountCredentials: Account credentials.

Integrations/scripts used: BeyondTrust Password Safe, Set.

  type: unknown
